# Handcrafted

**Path:** `trajectory/handcrafted`

Trajectory or sequence recognition based on deterministic distance, overlap, registration, or temporal rules.

## Scope

**Include:** odometry-constrained sequence matching; handcrafted trajectory consistency

**Exclude:** learned sequence encoder
